Tests if `Number.MIN_VALUE` is equal to `5e-324`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks if the constant `Number.MIN_VALUE` is equal to `5e-324`. It serves to verify the smallest positive numeric value that JavaScript can represent, which is a fundamental aspect of the language's number handling. The assertion will pass if `Number.MIN_VALUE` is indeed `5e-324`, otherwise, it will throw an error, indicating a discrepancy in the expected behavior of the JavaScript environment. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating a single numeric constant.
